Description: Dev Tunnel Gateway - serverless ngrok-like relay for local development

Properties.Description: WebSocket API authorizer - validates auth tokens from SSM
Handles WebSocket $connect route - creates session in DynamoDB
Handles tunnel registration - assigns subdomain and public URL
Forwards HTTP requests through WebSocket tunnel to CLI client
Processes heartbeat messages and updates session timestamps
Health check endpoint - verifies DynamoDB connectivity
Receives HTTP responses relayed back through the WebSocket tunnel
Path prefix where authentication tokens are stored. Create tokens manually as SecureString parameters at /dev-tunnel/tokens/{tokenId}.
Properties.Name: /dev-tunnel/config/token-path

WebSocketApiWebSocketEndpoint33130A78.Description: WebSocket API endpoint URL for the Dev Tunnel control plane

OutputsWebSocketApiEndpoint70BA4207.Description: WebSocket API endpoint URL for tunnel control channel (WSS)

OutputsHttpApiEndpoint212C7719.Description: HTTP API endpoint URL for inbound mobile app traffic

BootstrapVersion.Description: Version of the CDK Bootstrap resources in this environment, automatically retrieved from SSM Parameter Store. [cdk:skip]

Assertions.AssertDescription: CDK bootstrap stack version 6 required. Please run 'cdk bootstrap' with a recent version of the CDK CLI.
